mapper.sql: select a.asset_id, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, a.category_id, a.brand, a.model, a.specification, a.serial_no, a.asset_status, a.asset_source, a.use_org_dept_id, a.manage_dept_id, a.current_user_id, a.current_location_id, a.purchase_date, a.inbound_date, a.start_use_date, a.original_value, a.residual_value, a.warranty_expire_date, a.supplier_name, a.qr_code, a.version_no, a.template_version, a.extra_fields_json, a.status, a.del_flag, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from asset_info a left join sys_dept scope_dept on scope_dept.dept_id = a.use_org_dept_id left join sys_user scope_user on scope_user.user_id = a.current_user_id
mapper.update: update asset_info set asset_status = #{assetStatus}, use_org_dept_id = #{useOrgDeptId}, manage_dept_id = #{manageDeptId}, current_user_id = #{currentUserId}, current_location_id = #{currentLocationId}, inbound_date = #{inboundDate}, start_use_date = #{startUseDate}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, version_no = ifnull(version_no, 0) + 1, update_time = sysdate() where asset_id = #{assetId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into asset_info ( asset_code, asset_name, category_id, brand, model, specification, serial_no, asset_status, asset_source, use_org_dept_id, manage_dept_id, current_user_id, current_location_id, purchase_date, inbound_date, start_use_date, original_value, residual_value, warranty_expire_date, supplier_name, qr_code, version_no, template_version, extra_fields_json, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{assetCode}, #{assetName}, #{categoryId}, #{brand}, #{model}, #{specification}, #{serialNo}, #{assetStatus}, #{assetSource}, #{useOrgDeptId}, #{manageDeptId}, #{currentUserId}, #{currentLocationId}, #{purchaseDate}, #{inboundDate}, #{startUseDate}, #{originalValue}, #{residualValue}, #{warrantyExpireDate}, #{supplierName}, #{qrCode}, #{versionNo}, #{templateVersion}, #{extraFieldsJson}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update:
update asset_info set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where asset_id in
#{assetId}
